name: security-p2p
description: P2P Zero Trust Security para Event Core. Cifra/descifra eventos entre cores usando X25519 + AES-256-GCM via hooks transparentes (beforeEventPublish, afterEventReceive). Cache de shared_secrets in-memory con eviction LRU (max_shared_secrets, default 100). Handshake P2P over MQTT (core/+/security/handshake/{request,response}/#).
author: Event Core Team

publishes.description: Peer trusted (manual o tras handshake exitoso). project_id top-level + correlation_id + timestamp.
Trust revocado para un peer. project_id top-level + correlation_id + timestamp.
Handshake timeout (no response del peer en handshake_timeout_ms).
Handshake fallo (HMAC mismatch, clave invalida, etc.).

Respuesta al request del par. Lleva public_key (PEM) + fingerprint + has_keys + request_id propagado. error: {code,message} si falla. Reemplaza el acceso directo a keyManager.getPublicKey() via moduleLoader.

subscribes.description: Cualquier modulo que necesite la public key del core la pide por bus en lugar de leer keyManager via moduleLoader.

tools.name: security-p2p.status
tools.description: Returns the current security-p2p status: module/version, encryption_enabled, local fingerprint, trusted_peers count, shared_secrets cache size and runtime stats.

tools.name: security-p2p.public-key
tools.description: Returns this core's public key (PEM) and its fingerprint. Used by peers performing handshake.

tools.name: security-p2p.trust-peer
tools.description: Marks a remote public_key as trusted. Computes shared secret eagerly when possible and emits security.peer.trusted.

public_key.description: PEM-encoded public key of the peer.

name.description: Optional friendly name for the peer.

project_id.description: Optional project id for event propagation.

tools.name: security-p2p.revoke-peer
tools.description: Revokes trust for a previously trusted public_key. Drops cached shared secret and emits security.peer.revoked when applicable.

public_key.description: PEM-encoded public key of the peer to revoke.

project_id.description: Optional project id for event propagation.

tools.name: security-p2p.trusted-peers
tools.description: Lists currently trusted peers (truncated public keys, friendly names, trusted_at timestamps).

tools.name: security-p2p.health
tools.description: Health check for the security-p2p module: has_keys, encryption_enabled, trusted_peers and shared_secrets cache size.

persistence.owner: SecurityP2PModule (KeyManager keys + Map _sharedSecrets con eviction LRU + CryptoHandshake pendientes)
